id: INSTRUCTIONS BELOW - DELETE THIS ROW BEFORE SENDING
- id: give each mosque a unique number (continue from last number in locations.js)
- name: full name of mosque or eid ground
- area: district or neighbourhood (e.g. Garki / Wuse / Kubwa)
- city: Abuja (or Suleja etc if outside Abuja)
- type: write exactly one of these three words:  eid  OR  jumuah  OR  both
- eidTime: e.g. 8:00 AM  (leave blank if not an Eid location)
- jumuahTime: e.g. 1:30 PM  (leave blank if not a Jumuah location)
- imam: imam full name (write  To be announced  if unknown)
- phone: mosque phone with country code e.g. +2348012345678  (leave blank if unknown)
- whatsapp: whatsapp number digits only no + sign e.g. 2348012345678  (leave blank if unknown)
- lat: latitude from Google Maps  (right-click mosque pin on Google Maps to get this)
- lng: longitude from Google Maps  (second number after the comma)
- verified: write  true  for confirmed locations   false  if not yet confirmed
- featured: write  false  for now  (true = shown at top  reserved for future premium feature)
DELETE ALL ROWS ABOVE THIS LINE BEFORE SENDING TO 2NOW TECHNOLOGY
